body: One thing that bites a lot of agent setups at scale is silent divergence between steps. By the time something breaks, the issue happened 3-5 steps earlier. VeilPiercer captures exactly where your agent diverged and why — per-step read vs produced, fully local.
context: r/LocalLLaMA | Prometheus Metrics for Ollama Agents

body: The debugging gap with multi-step agent pipelines is usually not the final error — it's what the model was reading 3 steps before the failure. Per-step state snapshots let you replay exactly what context each agent operated on.
context: r/LangChain | How do you debug agent chains in production?
